raw: {"perspective": "Readiness Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "major", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The self-check loop may create noise if not properly tuned, leading to unnecessary tasks and potential performance issues", "recommended_fix": "Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task threshold or a cooldown period, to prevent unnecessary task creation"}, {"severity": "minor", "file_or_area": "atlas_swarm_daemon.py", "issue": "The removed prod health curl may lead to a monitoring gap, as GH Actions may not cover all production health aspects", "recommended_fix": "Consider reintroducing a prod health check or ensuring GH Actions covers all necessary production health monitoring"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: The self-check loop may create noise if not properly tuned, leading to unnecessary tasks and potential performance issues
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a noise reduction mechanism, such as a task threshold or a cooldown period, to prevent unnecessary task creation

findings.issue: The removed prod health curl may lead to a monitoring gap, as GH Actions may not cover all production health aspects
findings.recommended_fix: Consider reintroducing a prod health check or ensuring GH Actions covers all necessary production health monitoring
